goal: Prove a Codex-specific read-only adapter contract that inventories a marked disposable Agent Home and produces a deterministic non-mutating projection preview.

invariants: inventory and preview never create a durable transaction
inventory and preview never mutate an observed target
foreign and unknown ownership never become takeover authority
all scanned roots and targets remain within one marked disposable root
inventory ordering and digests are deterministic
CLI and direct core output use the same adapter decision path

verification.method: test-first contract, core, CLI parity, negative path, format, lint, dependency, and governance verification

nextGate: Any real Codex home read, apply, verify, rollback, Hook inspection or mutation, TUI, GUI, commit, or push requires separate authorization.
